findings.description: s1 hints are missing `Client` and `MessageLevel`, both of which appear in the confirmOfUpdate action code. `Client.class` is passed to `UniversalDao.exists(Client.class, ...)`, and `MessageLevel.ERROR` is used in `MessageUtil.createMessage(...)`.
findings.source_evidence: if (!UniversalDao.exists(Client.class, "FIND_BY_CLIENT_ID", new Object[] {Integer.parseInt(form.getClientId())})) { throw new ApplicationException(MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, "errors.nothing.client", form.getClientId())); }

findings.description: s2 hints are missing `SessionUtil`, which is used in the update action method: `SessionUtil.delete(context, "project")`.
